outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump announces 10-day ceasefire in Lebanon; US-Iran diplomacy continues
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump's announcement of 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. Analysis of how US blockade could decide the war. S&P 500 pulls back from record. Ceasefire expires April 22.

outlets.name: The Intercept
outlets.headline: The Dam Breaks: Democratic Senators Overwhelmingly Reject Arms Sales to Israel
outlets.summary: The Intercept leads with record 40 Democratic senators voting to block Israel arms sales. Highlights growing Democratic opposition to war. Hegseth impeachment articles filed with 12 cosponsors.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump continues Iran blockade as peace talks near; Lebanon ceasefire announced
outlets.summary: Fox News covers Trump's Lebanon ceasefire announcement. Pentagon briefing: US to intercept Iranian ships globally. Hegseth warns Iran of strikes on electrical grid. 13 ships turned back.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: US expands Iran blockade to target dark fleet ships worldwide
outlets.summary: Washington Examiner covers Pentagon announcement expanding blockade to global scope. Gen. Caine: any ship providing material support to Iran will be intercepted anywhere in the world.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump unveils Lebanon truce as US blockades Iran for deal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Trump's 10-day Lebanon ceasefire. Hopes grow for US-Iran breakthrough via Pakistan. Qasmiyeh Bridge destroyed. 4 paramedics killed in Mayfadoun. US blockade goes global.

outlets.name: France24
outlets.headline: Live: Trump says Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire
outlets.summary: France24 covers Trump's ceasefire announcement. First direct Israel-Lebanon diplomatic engagement since 1983. Aoun and Netanyahu invited to White House. Questions about Hezbollah compliance.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF Won't Withdraw Forces From Southern Lebanon During Cease-fire
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers senior Israeli official saying 'There is no ceasefire in Lebanon.' IDF to continue operations to Litani River. Lebanon fears talks could push country to brink of civil war.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: This is what the 'ceasefire' between Israel and Lebanon will look like
outlets.summary: Israel Hayom details ceasefire terms. IDF links withdrawal to Hezbollah disarmament. Israel demands enriched material removed and enrichment capability annulled. 5 divisions in buffer zone.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iranian launchers ready to sink all US warships: Leader's advisor Rezaei
outlets.summary: PressTV leads with Rezaei threatening to sink all US warships in Hormuz. Claims launchers aimed at USS Abraham Lincoln. Pakistan mediation continuing. Frames US blockade expansion as escalation.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pakistan's army chief lands in Iran for mediation
outlets.summary: Iran International covers Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir in Tehran. 'Significantly narrowing differences.' IDF destroys Qasmiyeh Bridge. 4 paramedics killed. Ceasefire extension negotiations.
